category_sources: Official GNU M4 manual describes m4 as an implementation of the traditional Unix macro processor.
source_facts.description says GNU m4 is a macro processing language.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page uses the name GNU M4.
source_facts.homepage is the GNU M4 project page.
docs_sources: Official GNU M4 project page links to documentation at gnu.org/software/m4/manual/.
repo_sources: Official GNU M4 project page lists the Savannah Git repository clone URL.
tags_sources: Official GNU M4 manual describes macro expansion, text manipulation, and use by GNU Autoconf.
